title: health check endpoint returns service status
description: Verify that a GET request to the /health endpoint returns a successful response indicating the backend service is available and operational.

title: chat endpoint returns chatbot response
description: Test that a POST request to the /chat endpoint with a valid support question returns an appropriate answer from either the FAQ matching or the RAG pipeline.

title: stats endpoint returns knowledge base statistics
description: Ensure that a GET request to the /stats endpoint returns accurate and complete statistics about the indexed vector database in the knowledge base.

title: docs list endpoint returns ingested documents
description: Check that a GET request to the /docs-list endpoint returns a list of all documents that have been ingested and indexed in the knowledge base.

title: ingest endpoint processes and indexes document
description: Validate that a POST request to the /ingest endpoint with a supported document file (PDF, DOCX, or TXT) successfully uploads, processes, and indexes the document, returning a confirmation response.
